multi_destination.description: Per-method-type multi-destination config, keyed by fulfillment method `type`. Open — businesses MAY add any method type; well-known keys are `shipping` and `pickup`. A type that is absent is not permitted.

allowed.description: Whether multiple destinations are allowed for this method type.

method_combinations.description: Method-type combinations the business permits within one cart. Each inner array is a permitted set of method `type` values (e.g. shipping + pickup).
